markdownRemark.html:
Components

  • Making Money - Notes on how to make money
  • Business - Notes on everything regarding business and growing an online business

What It Is

  • A system (portfolio of businesses) built around my personal brand and my life where all of my cash flows come from

    • Where you can host all of your freelance work, passive income, digital products, fun projects, musings
    • My central hub will be focused on my life journey and what my overarching goals are #heading

    • Inspiration

      • Tiago Forte @ Forte Labs (https://medium.com/praxis-blog/the-rise-of-the-full-stack-freelancer-c14a375445d9)

Value Proposition

  • I am an online growth engineering consultant (and small business goal consultant) who specializes in:

    • web development
    • copywriting
    • SEO
    • digital marketing and brand strategy
    • analytics and AI
  • I teach and help people to build their own small businesses to ultimately achieve financial freedom (or accomplish any of their huge goals like what I'm doing)
